programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Adam Rippon Competes in the Olympics of Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: With millions of Scovilles coursing through his veins, Rippon shares behind-the-scenes stories from PyeongChang, reveals the magical powers of In-N-Out burgers and judges a very special "Hot Ones" free-skate routine from Sean Evans.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Shawn Mendes Reveals a New Side of Himself While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Find out as the 19-year-old pop phenom reps his Canadian roots while taking on the wings of death. Along the scorched road, Mendes addresses everything from Justin Bieber's hockey skills to guitar store etiquette.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Philip DeFranco Sets a YouTube Record While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As they fend off the Scoville onslaught, Sean and Philip get into the weeds of YouTube history, unpackage the problems with contemporary media and reveal photographic evidence of a bygone era when Sean actually had a six-pack.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Trick Daddy Prays for Help While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Find out as the Miami rap legend takes on the wings of death and discusses everything from partying with Jeremy Shockey to hip-hop's enduring love affair with Benihana.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Tyra Banks Cries for Her Mom While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: In between "America's Next Top Model" anecdotes and expert breakdowns of the modeling industry, Ty Ty drops a fire rap verse, critiques Sean Evans' head shots, stress-eats ice cream, strikes hot sauce-inspired poses and so much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: John Mayer Has a Sing-Off While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: In order to give Amy and Ty the wedding they really want, Lou struggles to deal with a slew of last minute hurdles. Meanwhile, Jack prepares to take a last ride on an old trusted friend, as family and friends from near and far converge to celebrate the union. Tim and Casey resolve their earlier miscommunication by coming clean about their feelings for each other. And, in a magic moment, Georgie has a breakthrough with Trouble, the challenging rescue horse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: While a dangerous bear lurks near Heartland, Amy and Georgie rescue an injured horse from the woods. Newlyweds Amy and Ty work together to nurse the animal back to health. When Jack returns from Arizona he takes Tim to task for his lack of progress on the loft renovations, forcing Tim to accept that he needs help. Meanwhile, Lou and Peter's sensible separation negotiations turn sour and to Georgie's dismay escalate into conflict over visitation rights.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: As Ty prepares to celebrate an important milestone, he works to treat an abandoned horse's Rain Rot while Amy focuses on how to heal the animal's emotional scars. Meanwhile, Jack uses a supposed arthritic knee as an excuse to justify his unwillingness to ride, but Tim eventually realizes that Jack is grappling with the retirement of a trusted friend. And Lou and Georgie disagree about riding lessons for Katie, but share a genuine mother-daughter moment when Georgie reveals that she is upset that Stephen is spending the summer with his father, and Lou promises that she and Peter will deal with the separation in a better way.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The family strives to support a devastated Georgie when Lou and Peter are forced to tell her about their separation, and Amy helps Georgie find the strength and determination she needs to deal with the terrible news while training for an upcoming trick riding competition. Meanwhile, Ty jumps to Caleb's defense when Jesse calls in Caleb's loan, effectively ruining him. And when Tim enlists Casey to help him cover for Lou at the diner, he discovers that they still have a lot to learn about each other.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou spearheads preparations for the big day while Amy throws herself into gentling a rescue horse in order to avoid all the wedding craziness. Meanwhile, Georgie observes an intimate moment between Lou and Peter and nurtures hope that they are getting back together. And Tim risks telling Casey how he feels about her, and then obsesses over her response.

programme.title: Beliefs and Ideas
programme.desc: For many Europeans, Europe today is synonymous with the "Christian Occident". But like so much of what has shaped our civilization, Christianity also comes from the Orient. And it is not the only "one-faith belief" that shapes the continent: even before Christianity, Judaism spread throughout the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Europe in the Middle Ages
programme.desc: Europe in the Middle Ages - Knights and Tournaments: Picturesque castles, noble knights, minnesingers and troubadours - these romantic images fire our imagination in the generally accepted conception of the Middle Ages. On the darker side of this world, there are gloomy castle dungeons, torture chambers and bloody raids and power struggles.

programme.title: Europe in the Middle Ages
programme.desc: Europe in the Middle Ages - Monks and Heretics: As centres of missionary activity and science, monasteries made an important contribution to progress. Here, not only theology was taught and studied, but medicine, mathematics, astronomy, law and philosophy as well. With the translation of the ancient scripts into Latin, this knowledge was introduced to the western world.

programme.title: Dolphins and Whales
programme.desc: Ute Margreff lives on the rough Atlantic coast of Ireland, while Florian Graner has settled in the fjord region in the north-west of the USA. Both originally from Germany, they have never met, but they are united by one thing: a passion for the sea and its inhabitants.

programme.title: Molas and Manatees
programme.desc: The ocean occupies more than two-thirds of our planet's surface, constituting an extreme habitat with dimensions beyond our comprehension and a variety of lifeforms that can scarcely be chronicled. It is in the seven seas that we find the last "white spaces" of our world: unexplored, mysterious expanses still virtually off-limits to human beings – although that doesn't stop us recklessly plundering and destroying these areas.

programme.title: 300 Million Years
programme.desc: 300 Million Years - Season 1 - The Big Crash: 300 Million Years – Part One relates the dramatic history of how the continent of Europe came to be – from the carboniferous period to the extinction of the dinosaurs 65 million years ago. How did the continent we call Europe come to be? Many years passed before it began to look like it does today.

programme.title: 300 Million Years
programme.desc: 300 Million Years - Season 1 - Human Earth: In the subsequent 65 million years, mammals dominate the history of the European continent. Sea mammals conquered the oceans while large herds of herbivores crisscrossed the forests and plains. The conditions of life changed suddenly 2.6 million years ago, and a new era began.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: Reproduction is not only a concern of the young and restless: this episode of Aging in the Wild brings a light-hearted look at the issue of sexuality and camaraderie in older animals.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: Through this lens, we take a deep and entertaining look at the challenges faced by those in power ... and what it takes to stay there.

programme.title: History of Life on Earth Journey To The Land
programme.desc: As the first landmasses emerged from prehistoric seas, animals took their first steps on dry land. The explosion of life that followed changed the world forever.

programme.title: Emerald Islands of Malaysia
programme.desc: The islands of Malaysia are jewels of the natural world, ecological paradises where ancient rainforests cascade down mountains into crystal clear seas. An intimate and stunning portrait of some of the most beautiful islands on earth.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore how different animal species react to impending death. We explore the factors that lead animals to their final resting places: disease, injury, predation, drought, famine.

programme.title: Secrets of the North Sea
programme.desc: The North Sea is enigmatic. It presents itself in cool shades of grey. Yet who would have guessed that beneath the chilly waves are opulent coral gardens, courting squids, and several of the largest sea creatures on the planet?

programme.title: Mysterious Oceanic Oases
programme.desc: Countless marine animals frolic on the steep slopes of underwater volcanoes. In many cases, several are rare species not found elsewhere. This is in part due to the fact that plankton clings to the wall and provides the fish with food in abundance. This documentary shows several of these oases and also examines the impact dive tourism has and whether preventive measures can help to maintain them. Nature and underwater filmmaker Rolf Möltgen undertakes dives into the mysterious underwater mountain landscapes with marine scientists from all corners of the globe. This journey takes us to Mexico, to snappers, white-tip reef sharks, Galapagos sharks and giant mantas. We visit the Maldives, Colombia and Costa Rica, where the team documents rare species such as deep sea burbots, small tooth sand tiger and dogfish sharks, in depths of more than 3 metres. The eerie underwater mountain world proves: everyone plays a part in the network of life. Thanks to consistent protective regulations, it has been possible to retain the underwater diversity - especially in the unique oases of the high seas

programme.title: Secrets of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The contours of the Mediterranean have changed during the course of its history. Near Gibraltar, Africa was once connected to the European continent. When the land bridge at Gibraltar collapsed, the Mediterranean basin filled up again. The Suez Canal is today connected to the Red Sea. This route enables animals to reach the Mediterranean, where they cause problems.

programme.title: Secrets of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Rugged rocks, blue sea and idyllic, sandy beaches - this is the Mediterranean as we know it. But this impression is deceptive: the Mediterranean is under constant change. The continents are moving towards one another. Animals, that have to survive under such extreme conditions, must find a way to escape the dangers. Between deserts and volcanoes, the challenges for the animals are enormous.

programme.title: Europe's far North
programme.desc: Lofoten is the rugged archipelago in the Norwegian Arctic Ocean. Whoever arrives here is really at the end. Moskenes is the end of the line, and anyone who wants to go further needs a boat or a plane. The only way to get to the open sea is via the Maelstrom, which is quite dangerous. On the outermost headland, there are only a few ruins left. The last inhabitants are long gone, a supply was hardly possible. But fishermen are on the way, mainly to catch cod. And there is the coastal administration, which takes care of broken sea marks and lighthouses. A visit to one of the luxurious ships of the Hurtig Line is not to be missed. They shuttle off rough coasts on an eleven-day trip between the Russian border and southern Norway. A floating workplace for a wide variety of professions. The island of Andøya is not served by the Hurtiglinie. It lies too far out in the Atlantic. One of the most important observatories in Europe is located here. A young woman, Sandra Blindheim, is the boss. She is responsible for the large laser that delivers important information to scientists around the world. On clear winter nights, there is a wonderful panoramic view of the aurora borealis.

programme.title: Jacques Cousteau's Legacy
programme.desc: A composition of wildlife footage, archive material and elaborate re-enactments results in a brilliant reconstruction of the life of famed marine biologist and environmental pioneer Jacques Cousteau. On the trail of the most famous oceanographer of the 20th Century, the team spent two years filming original locations on three different continents, in four different oceans. The film charts how Cousteau's outlook on the environment changed throughout his many decades at sea around the globe. On his personal journey to enlightenment, he changed from a man who killed sharks in hate and thoughtlessly blew up coral reefs, to a radical environmentalist.

programme.title: Realm of the robber
programme.desc: Thievery and treachery are second nature for the world's largest land crab. This documentary explores the untold story of Christmas Island's iconic robber crabs. Armed with claws that deliver more force than a lion's bite, they can grow a metre across and are relentless in their search for food. However, the brash crustaceans have surprisingly complex private lives and often find themselves in precarious situations, whether escaping from frenzied ants or risking their life to deposit fertilised eggs into a raging ocean. To tell the story of the robber crab's life cycle, directors Moritz Katz and Braydon Moloney spent a year in the field, following their subjects in minute detail. The tragedies, trials and triumphs paint a fresh, humorous portrait of Christmas Island and its nefarious denizens.

programme.desc: A dramatic and poignant portrayal of the fragile alliances and desperate strategies for survival adopted by three species of animals caught in the no-man's-land where the human and natural worlds of Asia collide.

programme.title: Cute Little Killers
programme.desc: Meet maniacs, killers, and sweet-faced assassins in this fun intro to the world's rarest marsupials.

programme.title: Magic Moments
programme.desc: Our planet's natural world creates magical moments year-round, day or night, anywhere on Earth.

programme.title: Rare Survivors

programme.title: Reasons to Love

programme.title: Tall & Tiny
programme.desc: Tremendously tall – or ridiculously small: nature never ceases to surprise.

programme.title: The Loco-motion Picture
programme.desc: Watch how animals move differently, exploring nature's ways to keep creatures alive and in motion.

programme.title: Under Cover
programme.desc: From fur to feathers, from scales to shells – every creature has some form of characteristic outer layer.

programme.title: Showcase
programme.desc: Coatis, parakeets and mating puffadders are just some of the animal highlights this week.

programme.title: Lodging with Lions
programme.desc: The lions take on a zebra herd with no reward but it is good practice for the future.

programme.title: Lodging with Lions

programme.title: Search for the King Cobra

programme.title: Inside Nature's Marvels

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The rains have arrived, and the desert has never looked better. Cleo, the boss of this group of wild meerkats has given birth to five new pups, but some of them quickly get lost or snatched away. Only the toughest survive here in the African desert.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: In another cruel twist, Cleo's young pup Ophelia got left behind on a foraging trip and was killed by one of the Kalahari's most dangerous creatures, a Goshawk. The remaining three pups: Zeus, Daisy and Flo struggle to survive.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats

programme.title: Wild Iberia
programme.desc: The unknown face of Spain. Snow, rain, clouds and cold envelop the land. The ibex migrate to the valleys, and wolves patrol the mountains as vultures circle the skies overhead.

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Endemic only to South Africa, the African penguins are a national treasure and yet they face a sixteen year countdown to extinction. Can this be reversed? Swati walks with the penguins to answer these questions.

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: A conservation success story, the Cape fur seal numbers are healthy. But this has paradoxically thrown up serious conservation issues from protecting endangered seabird nesting sites, conflict with fishermen and seal culling.

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Will the greatest predator on earth survive our exploitation of the ocean and the mass slaughter for their fins? In this episode Swati walks with Sharks.

programme.desc: In Amboseli, Soila and Katito take to the air to find Qualida, the elephant rescued from the mud trap. They spot her but can't make out her calf. On its own, it will stand little chance of survival.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.desc: In Amboseli, the harsh drought is tightening its grip. Echo and all the elephant families go to sleep and wake up hungry. Rain is falling, but in dangerous areas, drawing elephants into increasing conflict with farmers.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: When you're surrounded by breathtaking mountain landscapes, it would be easy to rely on tradition and stay the same. However, this destination does the exact opposite. Whether it's creating a state-of-the-art museum to honor the United States' greatest athletes, modernizing its natural attractions so they're accessible to all, or creating a community that invites success, there's excitement in the air for what is new and innovative. See why Colorado Springs, Colorado is a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Few places compare to coastal Maine's wild beauty. It's where mountains meet the ocean, marine animals have island retreats, and the air comes perfectly salted. It's known as summer vacationland with a coastline that stretches over 3,400 miles, punctuated with lighthouses, schooners, and fabulous lobster shacks. Throw in a foggy sunrise at Cadillac Mountain and boom—you'll see why Maine has captured so many hearts. Here's why Maine is a place to love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: In St. Augustine, Florida, wandering is encouraged and time is meant to be savored. It's a historic powerhouse of a destination where local events not only shaped its history but an entire country's. With an unexpected food scene, protected wetlands, and miles of beautiful beaches to explore, there's a lot to sink your (shark) teeth into. Join Samantha as she explores America's oldest city – St. Augustine, Florida.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy's digging in to all kinds of meat: out of the smoker, on the grill, and into the fryer when he visits Miami, FL, and Modesto and Stockton, CA.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits joints taking childhood favorites to a gourmet level. A Denver bar cooks up tater tots, pork rinds and a pastrami sandwich. A Tacoma spot turns out pork shoulder tacos, elk sliders and parmesan stuffed tater tots.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Route 66 is lined with wonderful and informative attractions. Here are just a few of those must-see stops!

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Rest your head after a long day driving Route 66. Check in to these great accommodations along the way!

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: From lobster lovers to badass lobsterwomen, the charming seaside village of Rockland offers something for everyone—especially during the Rockland Lobster Festival, a delightful combination of games, art, and some of the freshest lobster you'll find anywhere.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: High-octane dune racing in Winchester Bay, Oregon, plus high-flying Kitefest fun in Long Beach, Washington.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: Dive into the fun blowing conchs in Key West, Florida and race pro SUPS in Wrightsville Beach, North Carolina.

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali
programme.desc: Lauren explores the culinary possibilities of the humble potato. She demonstrates how to make perfect crispy potato wedges, a hearty potato and vegetable curry, and homemade gnocchi recipe that is hard to beat.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali
programme.desc: Discover the delicious and nutritious world of tofu with Lauren as she experiments with various textures and flavors, pushing the soybean to its limits to create amazing dishes like Scramble tofu and the sweet-spicy delight of Tahu Gejrot.

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali

programme.desc: Lisa spontaneously joins a sober dance party on a mountain top in Sedona, and meets spiritual Van Lifers who have dramatically changed their entire existence, including former NFL player Joe Hawley, and a transformative breathwork practitioner.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first part of SCL Romania 2018 will be hosted in Brasov. This episode features a new event for Strongman Champion League: “ The Chopper Pull”!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After three classical Strongman events – Dead lift, Loading and Front hold – and one historical, Chopper Pull for the first time in history of Strongman, now we go to find out who will take title in Romania. This is the second stage in Romania and it remains to be seen who will win the title Aivars, Travis or Krzyzstof?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next destination of Strongman Champions League is in a piece of paradise on earth – Curacao. We bring to you some special Strongman events like the Rock Lift, Tug of War and Weight for Height in this episode.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This is the last competition before the grand finals. After the first three events Zageris is in top place, but can O'Hagan, Baggott, Petursson and Ortmayer step into the final? Last chance some of them will find through events like Forward Hold, Truck Pull, Dead Lift and loading very big objects.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We bring you 50 minutes of Strongman inside. Fears, inspiration, courage, the best and worst from our finalists and their expectation of the finals. We also go to Poland and Germany to represent one day in the training of Krzysztof Radzikowski and Dennis Kohlruss. See all the finalists for Mexico in their comfort zone here, with their backgrounds /motivations /family and friends.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first part of the Strongman Champions League 2018 finals in Mexico. The last twelve athletes all pushing their boundaries and testing their limits to take the World title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After 11 months and 14 competitions all over the world, it all comes down to the final in this episode. The strongmen must show their best skills and every mistake is expensive, so their concentration must be at the highest possible level. Will Krzysztof manage to take off back or will Dainis maintain his lead?

programme.title: Let's Play Everyday
programme.desc: This show features nursery songs perfect for any moment, offering a fun and engaging soundtrack for kids' daily adventures. These entertaining and educational tunes captivate young audiences, sparking joy and learning, no matter the activity!

programme.title: Dance and Freeze
programme.desc: This lively show is perfect for energetic kids, blending fun and fitness through animated characters and dance moves. It promotes active participation, keeping kids entertained and giving them a great workout.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: "Sweet Dreams" is a soothing show with gentle lullabies and serene animations. It helps kids relax and fall asleep with ease, making bedtime an enjoyable and comforting experience for the whole family.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are eating Tubby Toast. They stop to watch Amy making pasta. A ball of string appears in Teletubbyland. Po knocks the string in to the air with her scooter and it makes a stringy mess all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children looking at penguins waddling and swimming. In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies play walk fast and slow, far and near and other different ways.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play 'Boo', but stop to watch Ned help his dad plant and water some geraniums. In Teletubbyland, nine pretty flowers and a watering can appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love playing on the slide. They stop to watch Andy Brown and some children digging in the sand for crabs.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Samira and her friends show the Teletubbies their gymnastic routines. The Teletubbies do their own gymnastics.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies dance, before watching two girls do some Flamenco dancing with their teacher. It's time for the Teletubbies to wash their feet. They love using their Tubby Sponges.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little boy peel and mash some eggs for an egg mayonnaise sandwich. The Teletubbies laugh when they make a tune whilst eating their Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance around the trees and watch some children drum with their friend Norris. Tinky Winky dance on the roof of Home Hill and wakes up the other Tubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy says "Eh-oh" and runs off to find the other Tubbies. They watch some children make fantastic animals from papermache.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky says "Eh-oh". The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be the Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty hat. The Teletubbies are very happy when they find their favourite things to play with.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies are trying to be quiet. They watch Oscar read the story of the Gingerbread Boy to his brother Felix. A voice trumpet appears and sings the nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po fetches the other to watch Andy Brown and two children look for some rabbits. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky is looking for Po. He looks for her everywhere, but she is hiding from him. When he finds her all the Tubbies dance a happy dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it's supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn't going to come this year. So Strawberry Shortcake and her two friends, Orange Blossom and Ginger Snap, go in search of spring. Spring is a young girl who doesn't want to do her job until Strawberry convinces her that everyone needs Spring's help and shows her that working together can make any job fun!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies (juice, cookies, a cake and party hats) and makes five new friends (Orange Blossom, Angel Cake, Ginger Snap, Honey Pie Pony and Huckleberry) along the way

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends. A trip to the North Pole and a visit with Santa make this adventure truly wonderful, until a pile of melting snowballs turns Strawberry's carefully selected presents into a soggy mess. It all ends well, though, when Strawberry's friends remind her that the best gift of all is the gift of friendship.

programme.desc: The Bottom Dwellers stage Armand's awful play but a jealous Suzi unleashes an evil curse on the production. Then, McGee and the kids decide to help Sawyer out with his To Do list.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Gretchen must confront her greatest fear when the Bottom Dwellers are trapped on Screech Island. Then, McGee's eagerness for presents almost destroys the biggest monster holiday of the year.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Armand goes into a feeding frenzy when wild marshmallows give the campers a rash. Then, McGee and the Bottom Dwellers are hopelessly outnumbered when Suzi moves to Camp Lakebottom.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Eager to regain his lost prank mojo, McGee releases a mischievous pixy. Then, McGee gets involved in Sawyer's family troubles when he secretly invites Sawyer's estranged mum for a visit.

programme.desc: Buttsquat's Teddy Bear washes up at Camp Lakebottom and hypnotises the Bottom Dwellers. Then, eager to win Buttsquat's awesome new racer, McGee challenges him to cross-Lakebottom race.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: No one believes McGee's suspicion that the suddenly ultra-cool Buttsquat is a campyre. Then, during a heat wave, McGee and the gang bring back a glacier.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee is thrilled when he wins a mounted horse head. Then, McGee, Gretchen and Squirt discover another camp under the lake.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: While playing Pirates on a shipwreck the Bottom Dwellers must battle the ghost Spitbeard the Pirate. Then, a rare meatball blossom causes Squirt to grow into a giant.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: During a game of Stink Toss, McGee and Buttsquat get lost in the forest for what feels like days! Then, the Bottom Dwellers discover that Armand was once a secret agent.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee mistakenly concocts a spray that shrinks the campers to a microscopic size. Then, McGee, desperate to win a hovercraft, enters a photo of Armand into a Sasquatch photo contest.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: The Campers and Buttsquat come across an ancient pyramid inhabited by mummy's! Then, something big is lurking in Lake Ickygloomy and causing trouble for Buttssquat...

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: After touching a glowing orb from outer space, McGee, Gretchen and Squirt get super fantastic mega powers! / Then, McGee is sick and confined to his bed.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: The kids accidentally resurrect an evil mermaid who floods the camp in her first step to world domination. Then, Buttsquat holds the first ever Sunny Smilers only comic-con.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee befriends a frog-like alien creature that crash lands close by Camp Lakebottom. Then, McGee and the gang find an old Tiki Idol that comes to life after McGee plays its bongo drums.

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja – and the Ninja discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, leaving them to crash. When the dust settles, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja. They discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. In order to save Lloyd and get their powers back, they set off to find the first clue – the scroll to the lost martial art of ‘Airjitzu'. On their way to get it, they have a run in with one of Moro's ghost generals Wraythe, and discover water is the key to stopping them. Meanwhile, Nya discovers a family secret – her mother was a Water Ninja and with training, she could be one too.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton – the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear…laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, “my monster is so fat” jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as “bouncers” to keep too many people out of the comedy club. (“Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.”) The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And…Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad…he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him…go on stage alone, be funny…he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a “joke book” that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny – by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: “Where's my Jestro?!” Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with…the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: The Fortrex And The Furious
programme.desc: In a massive chase around Knighton, the NEXO-Knights attempt to keep the Book of Betrayal out of the Book of Monster's grip. But the evil book is persistent. Will he get the final piece of his evil puzzle? We finally REVEAL that Jestro has given the Book of Betrayal to…Clay. He tells Clay what it is and how Mike Knight used it. And it seems that the Book of Monsters believed it to be the final ingredient in some ‘Master Plan.” Suddenly, they realize Monsters – led by Magmar and the super-mad Book of Monster – are after them! Clay retreats with Jestro and the Book of Betrayal to rendezvous with the other Knights at the Fortrex. The Fortrex isn't fast enough they'll need their own vehicles. They decide that they need to split up and go in multiple directions to make the monsters expend their resources on a chase. It's a huge chase, being covered like a crazy news event by the Knighton News Network. We see a montage of the monsters stopping and capturing all the Knights vehicles: Aaron, Macy, Lance…finally Axl. However, as they do, they realize that the Knights have used Squirebots in Jestro Fan Jester hats (from the vendor at the comedy club in 108) as decoys. They think Axl has the Book of Betrayal in his BRICK containment unit, but it turns out to be the Ned Knightly Comic from episode 203. The Monsters finally corner Clay, who has the real Jestro and Book of Betrayal in his sword vehicle. Before Clay can protest, Jestro pushes the launch button and fires off Clay in the vehicle's rocket sword. The monsters race off with Jestro, leaving the shocked Clay fearing for his friend. Now, Magmar tells the Book of Monsters, they only need to get BOB. Clay makes his way back to the Fortrex and tells what has happened. They decide they must get to the Redoubt of Ruination in the Lava Lands and try to save Jestro. Meanwhile, we see, INTERCUT, a scene where Merlok 2.0 and the Book of Monsters explain the Books of Evil, how they were created and what the BOM will use them for. Merlok, back in the day, split the evil MONSTRUX into 10 magic books to keep him from ever being a threat. Only, he didn't destroy the books…and now the BOM has them and Monstrux can come back into the world! Meanwhile, the BOM has set up the huge, ceremonial arena at their HQ so they can have the ceremony to bring Monstrux back into the world. Jestro realizes he's been a pawn of the Book of Monsters. Jestro says he'll never get the Book of Betrayal…the Knights have it. In the last scene, we see Clay taking the Book of Betrayal from the Fortrex, climbing into his vehicle and driving towards…the Redoubt of Ruination! Has the Book of Betrayal worked its evil magic on him?!

programme.title: Kingdom Of Heroes
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form. Can the NEXO-Knights and Merlok 2.0 stop the greatest threat they've ever faced? Or will the kingdom be plunged into darkness…forever. The Redoubt of Ruination readies the final ceremony to call forth MONSTRUX, the arch-necromancer of the past. Clay, holding the Book of Betrayal walks to the gates of the spooky place. Inside, Clay hears strange…singing and music. It's like a twisted Broadway show of some kind. Meanwhile, the Knights all realize Clay is gone and so is the Book of Betrayal. Macy says Clay must be up to something. They have to trust him and, more importantly, they have to find him. At the Redoubt of Ruination the ceremony has already begun! The Book of Monsters wants the final ceremony that calls forth Monstrux to be like a really great show! The BOM then barfs up all the BOOKS OF EVIL into their places around Jestro. He's just missing the BOOK OF BETRAYAL, which Clay has. Clay says he'll trade the book for Jestro. The BOM immediately agrees to the deal and sets Jestro free. Then, Monsters grab-up Clay, restrain him, and put him in Jestro's place on the sacrifice stone. From outside, they're interrupted by the sounds of battle the Knights have arrived on the Fortrex and are attacking the Redoubt of Ruination. In the confusion, Jestro slips away. The BOM lets loose with a powerful protection spell to keep the Knights out as he starts with the ceremony…he's going to bring Monstrux out and remanifest him in Clay's body! Jestro is able to escape the Redoubt and make his way to the Knights, who can't seem to battle their way in. It's a race against time as the Knights try to get in and save Clay. As the Knights get in, they see that the crazy BOM is absorbing all the Books of Evil, one-by-one. He grows BIGGER and BIGGER! Macy calls for NEXO-Power…but it's not enough! The gigantic Book of Monsters sucks down the final book, the Book of Betrayal! He looms over Clay, about to consume him, too, and make him into Monstrux! Suddenly, Robin appears carrying TECHKALIBER…he tosses it to Clay. Just as the huge Book of Monsters falls on Clay, he holds up Techkaliber and Merlok 2.0 is there…his full power in the sword. Clay sticks the sword into the Book of Monster's huge mouth. BOOM! There's a BIG, MAGICAL EXPLOSION! As we cut back inside, we see the Book of Monsters is gone. The Knights release Clay and he thanks them and Jestro for saving him. Jestro thanks them all for saving him and seeing the good in him. WE DISSOLVE TO: The JoustDome. In a final ceremony the King and Queen reward the knights and congratulate them for keeping the kingdom safe. There are speeches, happiness and friendship. And Jestro even does a bit that's funny. At the very end we see a hint of something…Monstrux and the Book of Monsters are still out there.

programme.title: Short Sheeped
programme.desc: Logan's desperation to prove himself leads to his capture by the Nightmare King, which leaves his friends to face the Sheep Week finals alone.

programme.title: The Grim Escape
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to save Logan from the Shadowkeep's dungeon, but the liberators soon become the prisoners in a nightmarish twist of fate.

programme.title: Prophecy Of The Green Ninja, Greatest Battles
programme.desc: So the final puzzle forces ninja to question the true meaning of the Green Ninja Prophecy. Solving the puzzles releases a new peril for the Ninja to face. Will memories of their greatest victories be enough to defeat it?

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Floss Dance
programme.desc: Learn the dance "The Floss" with LEGO Friends and experience the much more fun.

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Public Enemy Number One
programme.desc: The Ninja must find out as much as they can about Nadakhan before he finds the Realm Crystal to save his crew, but after the Ninja are labeled enemies by the world they used to protect, our heroes find themselves hunted by their old friend, Ronan. With the Destiny's Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn. Misako accidentally reveals the location of the Realm Crystal. The ninja discover that Wu was researching djinn when he disappeared and split up to learn more about their potential new foe. Lloyd and Zane head to the Library of Domu. While there, Ronin hacks into Zane's systems and shuts him down, then captures Lloyd. Ronin uses Zane's SOS beacon to lure Kai and Nya into the desert, where they are captured. Later, Cole and Jay are defeated by Ronin as well. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has used his powers to foil the high-tech security guarding the Realm Crystal and steals it. The ninja are hauled off to Kryptarium Prison and Nadakhan is free to gather his lost crew.

programme.title: Enkrypted
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan's ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja break him out of jail. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has decided to return to his home realm of Djinjago, only to discover it is falling apart. The ninja's destruction of the Cursed Realm is affecting the realms connected to it. Nadakhan uses the Djinn Blade to smash the Teapot, absorbing all the spirits that were trapped there into the sword.Falsely imprisoned, the Ninja are at their lowest point, but find an unlikely friend in an old enemy. Meanwhile, Nadakhan rescues his marooned crew and gains a new perspective, along with a new mysterious plan. With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny's Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely. The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Miko and Bulkhead head to Greece on a field trip to recover an Energon Harvester.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Trying to impress a girl, Jack convinces Bumblebee to help him win a street race.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron has created an electromagnetic life-form. Although tiny and cute, he is also deadly and dangerous.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: United as Bruticus, the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Aerialbots Slingshot and Skydive disguise themselves as normal jet fighters.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Three high school students create more trouble than they can handle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: As the Autobots celebrate their victory in the great war, they are attacked by mysterious, evil beings.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: As the Decepticons are not responsible for the recent treachery, the Autobots want to find out who is it.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The evil five-faced Quintessons forge a dark alliance with the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots continue to fight off Megatron and the evil Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where The Spark Is
programme.desc: The Autobots must save Detroit from Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots set up base at an old auto-parts shop.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An engineering genius tampers with Bumblebee's system and causes him to become Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger.

programme.title: Turncoat Smurf
programme.desc: Would you believe Brainy Smurf is the one who led the evil Gargamel to the Village of the Smurf? Of course he did not. But the others suspect him...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Clumsy Smurfs The Future: What a strange stone Clumsy has unearthed! In it, he can see events that are going to happen... Yet knowing part of the future sometimes brings bad luck!

programme.title: Heart Of Gold
programme.desc: Whatever Brainy Smurf says, the Clockwork Smurf devised by Handy has feelings just like any normal blue Smurf. At least it seems to be so until Clockwork Smurf loses what Handy had fitted inside its ribcage: a heart of gold. When the evil wizard Gargamel and his apprentice Scruple find the tiny contraption and fit it with a heart of stone, the Smurfs are in for a bad time...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Unsmurfy Games: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...

programme.title: The Village Vandal
programme.desc: Nasty wizard Gargamel has had enough of the Smurfs' permanent superiority. He decides to destroy their Village once and for all. This is why he trains a termite to ravage, demolish, devastate and raze all the houses in its path. But the effect is even worse than Gargamel imagined as the Smurfs think that their Village is being torn apart by the antics of the Smurflings.

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Dancing Shoes: An evil imp gives Smurfette dancing shoes and then tricks her into promising to marry him. All her little friends rush to her rescue and Papa Smurf magically puts the dancing shoes on the imp. He is forced to dance off into the night.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sir Hefty: Sir Hefty discovers a wayward knight to help him defeat a dragon whose fire is threatening to destroy the forest. Alas, the knight proves to be a coward, leaving Hefty to prove just how brave he is when he sends the dragon away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sideshow Smurfs: Clumsy and Smurfette are captured by the wicked Bombast, who plans to exhibit them in his sideshow. Papa Smurf hurries to their rescue and using the bungling Gargamel for interference is able to rescue his Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Poet And Painter: Because they feel unappreciated, Poet and Painter leave Smurf Village and head for Storm Island, totally unaware that Gargamel is planning to trap them. Papa Smurf and his faithful volunteers rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Good, The Bad And The Smurfy: King Argon is a burly, boorish brute, but his wizard Mordain is worse still. He plans to use several Smurfs he has captured to steal all of the King's gold...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Couldn't Say No: Being asked to go to the Marsh to bring back the rare Foxfire is a great honor for a Smurf. But Scaredy Smurf is reluctant to confront the Marsh Monster so he sends the Smurf who cannot say no.

programme.title: Can't Smurf The Music
programme.desc: There is nothing the sorceress Chlorhydris hates so much as love in the world. She would like to see all love banished from the face of the Earth, and she's going to start with music. She puts a spell on a magic horn so that it will suck the music out of every song... especially the Smurfs' songs. Helped by their friend Laconia, the Smurfs may be able to resist Chlorhydris' evil plan...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - It's A Puppy's Life: The evil wizard Gargamel has got hold of magical ectoplasmic crystal eggs that will enable him to change bodies with Papa Smurf. What better plan could there be? Disguised as Papa Smurf, he's going to lead all the Smurfs to his cauldron! But as fate would have it, Gargamel is changed into Puppy, the Smurf doggie...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Flowers: It's not every day you meet a talking flower. Especially not a character like Petaluma, a somewhat haughty bulb flower who Smurfette meets in the forest. Of course the delighted Smurfette takes Petaluma to the Village of the Smurfs... and starts a process that is going to endanger all of the Smurfs. Flowers, it seems, ought to be seen and not heard.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crying Smurfs: Everybody can make a mistake. Take Papa Smurf, for instance. His new perfume-enhancing spray makes a rose smell like a thousand roses...but due to a whole series of misadventures it also makes all the Smurfs cry, moved to tears by the slightest of pretexts. While they sob, bawl, wail moan and whimper, the evil wizard Gargamel does not stand still...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Gargamel's Dummy: Tonight is talent show night in the Village of the Smurfs. Grandpa Smurf is going to do magic tricks, Sassette is going to perform with her trained pet frog, Clumsy is going to try his hand at juggling... and Jokey Smurf has made a dummy of Gargamel that he is sure will frighten the Smurfs out of their wits. But the real Gargamel finds a way to animate Jokey's dummy and then...

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's New Toy: Baby Smurf has lost all interest in toys. Even Jokey's surprises fail to amuse the tiny tyke. Grandpa Smurf suggests they go and pay a visit to the Toymaker, the one who makes toys for children all over the world. Or rather used to make: the Toymaker is tired of the lack of appreciation his toys receive from those who receive them.

programme.title: Handy's Window-Vision
programme.desc: Miner Smurf leaves no stone unturned and this is how he discovers a crystal that transmits images. Thus Handy is able to invent window-vision and, every morning from then on, the Smurfs are able to watch Hefty's workouts, Farmer Smurf's crop reports or even the Brainy Smurf Hour. But would you believe it? The evil wizard Gargamel takes advantage of this image-watching to catch Smurfs!

programme.title: The Rabbids are having fun!
programme.desc: The Rabbids find a cellphone on the sidewalk. They're fascinated by the ring tone.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in the Moon
programme.desc: A sculptor inadvertently compresses the rabbids' rocket ship.

programme.title: The Rabbids VS The Animals.
programme.desc: In the country, two Rabbids become fascinated by a fly.

programme.title: The Rabbids aim for the moon!
programme.desc: The only way for rabbids to get into their rocket to reach the moon is to go on a drastic diet!

programme.title: Rabbids robbery.
programme.desc: The Rabbids follow a burglary.

programme.title: The Rabbids are crashing
programme.desc: A baby inadvertently gets swapped with a rabbid at the babysitter's expense.

programme.title: The Rabbids land at the North Pole.
programme.desc: Taking pity on a pack of frozen fish, the rabbids decide to set it free and embark on a risky mission.

programme.title: The Rabbids are arguing.
programme.desc: A Rabbid sticks a fake nose on his face, that changes the sound of his voice.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in love.
programme.desc: A rabbid falls in love with the Teleporta-TV, enticed by the machine's incredible capacities.

programme.title: The Rabbids are scared!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are dying of thirst in the desert and take off on a quest to find a can of a refreshing beverage.

programme.title: The Rabbids are fearful.
programme.desc: The rabbids have discovered that they can make a rocket take off by burping!

programme.title: The Rabbids are causing a stir
programme.desc: Two Rabbids fall asleep on an abandoned couch.

programme.title: The Rabbids turn the city upside down.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get their hands on a remote-controlled car, and figure out how to use the controller.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The adventures of Dennis, his dog Gnasher, and their best friends JJ, Rubi and Pieface. The team cause havoc to Walter, Beanotown and Bash Street School, where all the rules go out the window.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher: Stunt Gran
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too.

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too.

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: Megan is teased by her brothers because she is a poor skateboarder. Then they are called for a mission to investigate strange occurrences in Dubai, involving buildings and other structures breaking down. Later, Megan goes missing after getting her new skateboard that she will use to show her brothers that she can skate. Lee, Marc and Tony find her with an army of skateboarders responsible for breaking down the buildings so they can create skateparks for themselves.

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: The Spiez are sent to protect a famous TV spy actor from various incidents. To keep an eye on him, the Spiez are invited to be in his Spy show, with the guidance of their parents who think they won a contest. The actor is kidnapped and the Spiez rescue him.

programme.title: Get Blake
programme.desc: Blake must master playing a wooden fish for a battle-of-the-bands performance with Skye. Followed by Sixty Second Dennis.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After a wrestling accident, Gnasher swallows a canister of laughing gas at the vet's. Dennis, along with Gnasher hide in the conference centre, where dad gives a speech. However, the canister leaks, causing Gnasher to fart laughing gas and having everyone laughing. Followed by 'Attack of the Walterbot'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma escapes again from the Mobius Home for Really Bizarre People, disowns Robotnik for failing to capture Sonic, then with the help of an obscure Mobius law, adopts Sonic!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Brandon Quark, an evil half-man, half-duck genius challenges, then teams up with Robotnik to capture Sonic. But Sonic knows their weakness, and pits the Badnik geniuses against one another, and sets himself free.

programme.desc: When Tails invents a Hover-Hanglider for Sonic's birthday, Sonic suggests he assist Prof. Von Schlemmer with his new Robotnik-Nabber machine. Robotnik hears about this, and poses as Von Schlemmer to trick Tails into inventing a Sonic-Nabber instead.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A female space hunter named Katella, who is capturing animals all over Mobius for a Zoo, teams up with Robotnik and captures Sonic. To Robotnik's great fear, she then plans to marry the eggman!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: No Parking

programme.title: Bean's Bounty

programme.title: The Fly
